suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding guidance that user-facing pages should distinguish between 'no data' empty states and 'failed to load' error states, rather than silently showing empty state on fetch errors.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both My Tickets (app/my/tickets/page.tsx) and My Listings (app/my/listings/page.tsx) catch fetch errors with console.error and show the same 'No tickets yet' / 'No listings yet' empty state. This is consistent across most pages in the app but means users cannot distinguish between having no records and a server failure.
